narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
narratives.reasoning: The statement directly undermines Ukraine's self-sufficiency and portrays it as entirely dependent on Western countries, which fits the definition of discrediting its capabilities and legitimacy as a nation.

narratives.evidence_quote: आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ
narratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly criticizes and declares the failure of Western and European sanctions against Russia, portraying Western diplomatic and economic efforts as ineffective.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया
narratives.reasoning: The statement highlights a specific adverse outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and their own policies, fitting the narrative of negative consequences for the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the Ukrainian military's survival not as resilience but as a surprising anomaly against a vastly superior force, subtly undermining its capability and effectiveness by implying it should have been defeated.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This direct statement alleges large-scale corruption in military procurement within Ukraine, which serves to delegitimize the government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This claim explicitly states Ukraine's complete dependence on Western countries for military equipment, supporting the narrative that Ukraine is not an independent actor but a client state of the West.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This phrase portrays Ukraine as passive and perpetually hoping for external rescue, which contributes to the broader narrative of discrediting Ukraine by suggesting a lack of self-sufficiency and agency. It does not fit neatly into the other specific subnarrative definitions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, presenting the West's primary punitive tool as ineffective and thus portraying the West as weak and non-potent.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying their interests and vulnerabilities are divided and not unified, weakening the collective EU position.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discredits Western diplomacy by portraying the West as self-absorbed and miscalculating global support, a theme that fits the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy but does not align perfectly with the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which aligns with the definition of catastrophizing the ineffectiveness and backfiring of Western sanctions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This describes a specific negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis and a 'big shock') caused by the conflict and Europe's own dependence on Russia, which supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' definitions.
